comments: Along beach from Ferny Ness to the old pipe on Gosford Sands, moving in groups of 4-10 from east to west in a steady flow. Many coming over the water from Craigielaw Point. Strong northwesterly wind pushing toward shore. Then stepped into Gosford Estate and groups of 10-30 flying east across fields - steady movement in same direction as birds on beach. Prob undercount.
